## TDD Workflow

> Задачи организованы по TDD: Red → Green → Refactor.
> Каждый этап реализации начинается с .feature сценария (Red), затем реализация (Green), затем рефакторинг.

## Phase 1: Build pipeline (canonical layout + marketplace) (Green)

- [ ] Реализовать `buildCanonicalPlugin()` в `src/installer/plugin-canonical.ts` -- @feature1 @feature9 — Status: TODO | Est: 90m
  _Requirements: [FR-1](FR.md#fr-1-canonical-plugin-layout), [FR-9](FR.md#fr-9-single-canonical-plugin-manifest)_
  _Leverage: existing `src/installer/extensions.ts` aggregation_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] Функция читает все `extensions/*/extension.json`
  - [ ] Aggregates skills/commands/hooks/mcp в PluginTree
  - [ ] Generates `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` с canonical fields
  - [ ] Copies skills/<name>/SKILL.md из source `.claude/skills/` → repo root `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`
  - [ ] Writes hooks/hooks.json и .mcp.json
  - [ ] CANON001_10, CANON001_11, CANON001_12, CANON001_90 переходят из Red в Green

- [ ] Реализовать generation marketplace.json в `buildCanonicalPlugin()` -- @feature2 @feature10 — Status: TODO | Est: 30m
  _Requirements: [FR-2](FR.md#fr-2-marketplace-catalog-claude-pluginmarketplacejson), [FR-10](FR.md#fr-10-update-path-через-plugin-marketplace-update)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` generated с canonical schema (name=stgmt, owner, plugins[])
  - [ ] Plugin entry source="./" (relative to marketplace root)
  - [ ] Version field synchronized с plugin.json version
  - [ ] CANON001_20, CANON001_21, CANON001_100 переходят в Green

- [ ] Add `npm run build:plugin` script в package.json — Status: TODO | Est: 15m
  _Requirements: [FR-1](FR.md#fr-1-canonical-plugin-layout), [FR-9](FR.md#fr-9-single-canonical-plugin-manifest)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] `package.json` `scripts.build:plugin` запускает `node ./dist/installer/plugin-canonical.js` или эквивалент
  - [ ] Output: artifacts written в repo root (.claude-plugin/, skills/, commands/, hooks/, .mcp.json)
  - [ ] Build idempotent: repeated runs no-op если sources unchanged

## Phase 2: Migration cleanup script (Green)

- [ ] Реализовать `detectV1Install` в `tools/migrate-v1-to-v2.ts` -- @feature7 — Status: TODO | Est: 30m
  _Requirements: [FR-7](FR.md#fr-7-migration-v1-v2-documentation--optional-cleanup-script)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] Функция читает `<projectPath>/.dev-pomogator/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
  - [ ] Возвращает V1InstallInfo если version<2.0.0 AND no `.migrated-to-v2`
  - [ ] Возвращает null иначе (no v1 detected)
  - [ ] Inventory: skills/rules/commands/tools paths, hooks из settings.local.json, gitignore presence
  - [ ] Content hash compare для detecting user modifications
  - [ ] CANON001_70 переходит в Green

- [ ] Реализовать `runCleanup` в `tools/migrate-v1-to-v2.ts` -- @feature7 — Status: TODO | Est: 90m
  _Requirements: [FR-7](FR.md#fr-7-migration-v1-v2-documentation--optional-cleanup-script)_
  _Leverage: existing `src/updater/content-hash.ts`, gitignore marker pattern_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] Step 1: backup user-modified files в `<cwd>/.dev-pomogator/.user-overrides/<rel-path>`
  - [ ] Step 2: remove managed `.claude/skills/<dev-pomogator-managed>/`, `.claude/rules/<dev-pomogator-managed>/`, `.dev-pomogator/` (preserve `.user-overrides/`)
  - [ ] Step 3: remove managed marker block из `.gitignore`, preserve user entries
  - [ ] Step 4: smart-merge removal of dev-pomogator hooks/env из `.claude/settings.local.json`
  - [ ] Step 5: write `.dev-pomogator/.migrated-to-v2` marker
  - [ ] Step 6: print canonical install instructions (FR-7 step 4)
  - [ ] CANON001_71, CANON001_72, CANON001_73, CANON001_75 переходят в Green

- [ ] Idempotent re-run в `tools/migrate-v1-to-v2.ts` -- @feature7 — Status: TODO | Est: 20m
  _Requirements: [FR-7](FR.md#fr-7-migration-v1-v2-documentation--optional-cleanup-script)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] При detected `.migrated-to-v2` marker → exit 0 с message "Already migrated"
  - [ ] При no v1 detected → exit 0 с message "No v1 install detected; nothing to migrate"
  - [ ] No project files modified в обоих случаях
  - [ ] CANON001_74 переходит в Green

## Phase 6: Refactor & Polish

- [ ] Refactor `src/installer/extensions.ts` — вынести aggregation в shared utility — Status: TODO | Est: 45m
  _Requirements: [FR-9](FR.md#fr-9-single-canonical-plugin-manifest)_
  **Done When:**

  - [ ] No duplication между modules
  - [ ] All BDD scenarios остаются Green

- [ ] Final verification — Status: TODO | Est: 30m
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] `validate-spec.ts -Path .specs/dev-pomogator-canonical-plugin` → 0 errors
  - [ ] `audit-spec.ts -Path .specs/dev-pomogator-canonical-plugin` → 0 ERRORS severity
  - [ ] Все CHK-FR* в REQUIREMENTS.md → Verified status (для automated tests) или Manual review documented (для @manual scenarios)
  - [ ] All BDD scenarios Green: `npx vitest run tests/e2e/canonical-plugin-build.test.ts tests/e2e/migration-v1-to-v2.test.ts tests/e2e/cursor-removal.test.ts`
  - [ ] Manual verification:
    - [ ] `npm run build:plugin` → проверить `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` + marketplace.json + skills/ + commands/ + hooks/hooks.json + .mcp.json artifacts created
    - [ ] В fresh Claude Code session: `/plugin marketplace add ./` (local path) → confirm registered
    - [ ] `/plugin install dev-pomogator@stgmt` → confirm cache populated + `enabledPlugins` updated
    - [ ] `/reload-plugins` → skills available
    - [ ] Open Claude Desktop → confirm skills visible в Skill picker
  - [ ] `/simplify` final review clean
